description: Letter from an unknown writer, in Jerusalem, to Shelomo ha-Kohen and ʿOvadya Kohen, presumably in Fustat/Cairo. Dated: Thursday 24 Heshvan 5514 (עמדת), which is 1753 CE. Written in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic, and the address is written in Hebrew and Arabic script. Deals with a legal matter. The writers have close links to Damascus. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מירושלים. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
